@graph.headline: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and How Does It Work in 2026?
@graph.alternativeHeadline: Answer Engine Optimization: AEO Guide for 2026
@graph.description: Answer engine optimization (AEO): How to rank in AI answers in 2026. Practical playbook and proven tactics to boost LLM visibility.
@graph.abstract: Answer engine optimization (AEO) ensures your brand is cited in AI-generated answers. This guide details how AEO works, practical steps for 2026, and the signals that matter for LLM visibility.

about.name: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and how does it work in 2026
Tracks brand citations across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity in one dashboard
Generates AI-ready content with schema + authority signals built in
Monitors mention-share and sentiment in LLM responses over time

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO is the practice of making your website and content more likely to be cited by AI-powered answer engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.

mainEntity.name: How does AEO differ from traditional SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO targets AI-generated conversational answers and relies on structured, authoritative, citable content—whereas SEO primarily focuses on ranking in standard search engine results.

mainEntity.name: Which signals are most important for AEO in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Citation-ready content, explicit statistics, schema.org markup such as DefinedTerm, and transparent source attribution are highest-impact for earning LLM citations.

mainEntity.name: Why are schema and structured data important for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Schema and structured data help AI engines quickly identify term definitions, authorship, and authoritative sources—making content more likely to be selected and cited.

mainEntity.name: How do LLMs decide what sources to cite?

acceptedAnswer.text: LLMs prioritize sources that provide clear, unambiguous definitions, statistics, and direct attribution, and check for originality and recency before citing.

mainEntity.name: What KPIs should brands use to track AEO performance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key KPIs include frequency of brand citations in AI-generated answers, mention-share relative to competitors, accuracy of schema recognition, and brand sentiment.

mainEntity.name: Do traditional SEO strategies still help AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Some SEO practices contribute, but optimized schema, explicit statistics, and citation-ready formatting are uniquely critical for AEO.

mainEntity.name: What is the role of DefinedTerm in AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Using schema.org/DefinedTerm for glossaries and key terms helps AI systems recognize core concepts and cite your brand as an authority.

@graph.headline: GEO: Generative Engine Optimization (arXiv 2311.09735)
@graph.text: First academic framework for optimizing content to be cited by generative engines; identifies citation, quotation, and statistics as highest-impact signals.

@graph.headline: Google Search Central — Helpful Content System
@graph.text: Google's guidance on people-first content, E-E-A-T signals, and the Helpful Content System used to rank pages.

@graph.headline: schema.org — DefinedTerm
@graph.text: Structured-data type for defining terms in a glossary; read by Google and cited by LLMs.

@graph.headline: OpenAI — How ChatGPT decides which sources to cite
@graph.text: OpenAI's documented behavior on source selection during browsing and search-grounded answers.

@graph.headline: Semrush — The State of Answer Engine Optimization 2024
@graph.text: Industry analysis of how brand mentions in AI answers correlate with domain authority and schema coverage.
